content: Go database/sql transaction pattern: db.BeginTx(ctx, nil) returns sql.Tx. Use defer tx.Rollback() immediately after begin. All operations via tx.QueryRowContext(), tx.ExecContext(). Commit with tx.Commit() - deferred Rollback is no-op if committed. Never mix db.Exec() with tx.Exec() in same transaction scope. Use RETURNING clause in PostgreSQL INSERT to get generated IDs without a separate SELECT.
